phrases.english: I enjoy reading books in my free time.
phrases.arabic: أنا أستمتع بقراءة الكتب في وقت فراغي.
phrases.pronunciation: Ana astamti' bi qira'at al-kutub fi waqt faraghi.
phrases.context: Use this to talk about your favorite hobby.

phrases.english: My favorite hobby is playing football with my friends.
phrases.arabic: هوايتي المفضلة هي لعب كرة القدم مع أصدقائي.
phrases.pronunciation: Hiwayti al-mufaddalah hiya la'ib kurat al-qadam ma'a asdiqa'i.

phrases.english: I like listening to music, especially Arabic music.
phrases.arabic: أحب الاستماع إلى الموسيقى، وخاصة الموسيقى العربية.
phrases.pronunciation: Uhibbu al-istima' ila al-musiqa, wa khassatan al-musiqa al-'arabiyyah.
phrases.context: Express your enjoyment of a specific type of music.

phrases.english: I love to travel and explore new places.
phrases.pronunciation: Uhibbu as-safar wa istikshaf al-amakin al-jadidah.
phrases.context: Talk about your passion for exploring different locations.

phrases.english: I spend my weekends hiking in the mountains.
phrases.arabic: أقضي عطلة نهاية الأسبوع في المشي لمسافات طويلة في الجبال.
phrases.pronunciation: Aqdi 'utlat nihayat al-usbu' fi al-mashi li masafat tawilah fi al-jibal.
phrases.context: Describe how you spend your leisure time outdoors.
